## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 unet/
│   │   └── ernie-image-turbo-Q4_K_M.gguf
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   ├── ministral-3-3b.safetensors
│   │   └── ernie-image-prompt-enhancer.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│       └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```
## Join US
Join Reddit community [r/aicarries](https://www.reddit.com/r/aicarries)

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud updates follow stable releases, so some nightly-supported models may not be available yet.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: String (Multiline - Prompt)
widgets_values: 第一视角横版真实都市夜景照片。狭窄湿润的繁华街道纵深感强烈，两侧高楼林立，可见消防梯、管道、空调外机与暖调窗灯。左侧有红色竖版“HOTEL”霓虹灯，右侧为亮蓝色“BAR”招牌与黄色“OPEN 24 HoURS”灯箱。远处巨型电子屏散发青蓝色光，显示“NEON CITY”。粗糙湿润的沥青路面倒映霓虹灯光，一辆带有“TAXI”标识的复古黄色出租车行驶在道路中央，亮起红色尾灯。右侧人行道上有两名身穿深色外套、手持黑色雨伞的行人背影渐行渐远。街道尽头楼宇间隙中露出针状巨型钢铁电视塔，红色航空警示灯闪烁。电影级体积光，空气薄雾弥漫，冷调青蓝与暖调橙红形成鲜明对比，沉浸感与真实感十足。
